Join Us

Get in Touch

Everyone is welcome. Come fold with us.

Meeting Info

Come Fold With Us

We meet regularly around San Diego. All skill levels welcome — from first-time folders to seasoned artists. Free to attend.

When
Update with your meeting schedule
Where
Update with your location
Cost
Free. Paper provided for beginners.
Email
